// note: Standalone tsconfig for the e2e specs only. The app build (tsconfig.app.json includes ['src'] and tsconfig.node.json includes ['vite.config.ts']) does NOT reference this directory, so `tsc -b` and `npm run typecheck` in frontend/ never compile these files. Typecheck the specs with: npx tsc --noEmit -p frontend/e2e/tsconfig.json
